name: SIM800L GSM/GPRS Module (Red Breakout)
description: SIM800L quad-band GSM/GPRS module on the common red coreboard, 3.4-4.4V (2A bursts!), UART, u.FL + solder antenna pads, micro-SIM on back. Do not confuse with the larger blue SIM800L EVB v2.0.
dimensions_source: HAOYU coreboard photos, pitch-calibrated: board 24.9x22.7, 2x6 pins 2.54 pitch, columns 20.0 c-c (off-grid), first pin 5.7 below top edge. Pin names verbatim from silkscreen (NET has square pad).
